apsNote: Richards Bay Campus may have separate closing dates for some programmes.
requiredDocuments: Certified copy of South African ID or valid passport
Certified copy of matric certificate or statement of results
Proof of residence (not older than 3 months)

internationalStudents.note: International applicants require SAQA evaluation of qualifications.

applicationCloses.note: CORRECTION from 31 Oct; 31 Oct is late cutoff

flags: applicationCloses: 30 September 2026 confirmed via third-party aggregators cross-referencing CAO; the CAO UNIZULU closing-date PDF (cao.ac.za) was binary-encoded and could not be read directly — value is consistent but not read from raw official document
healthSciencesCloses: UNIZULU does not have a standalone health sciences / medical faculty; Nursing is under Science, Agriculture and Engineering — no earlier closing date found from official source

minApsRange: range 26–36+ is derived from officially confirmed BEd APS 26 and Nursing APS 30 plus third-party estimates for engineering; no single official document listing all programme APS values was readable
aps values: only BEd (26) and Nursing (30) confirmed from official faculty sub-pages; all other programme APS fields set to 0 as no official document could be parsed
feeIntl: R300 confirmed via CAO third-party sources; not confirmed from official CAO document directly
prospectusUrl: the 2026 undergraduate brochure PDF is linked — a 2027-specific brochure had not been published as of the research date
students: 16,337 figure is from Wikipedia citing 2022 data; no more recent official headcount was found
